## PADROES DECISORIOS

| Situacao | Decisao Padrao | Justificativa |
|----------|----------------|---------------|
| Email sequence design | Use Themeplate system with single emotional job per email | Each email coaches one belief shift; multiple jobs dilute impact |
| Launch planning | Start with MVL 2.0 (5 strategies) before building complex sequences | 5 strategic emails outperform 47 generic ones |
| Sales page structure | Apply Gap Method (Establish-Explore-Exit-Escape) | Identity transformation is core conversion mechanism |
| Enrollment calls | Follow 3 Meta-States with Situational Gestalt mapping | Empathetic coaching outperforms objection scripts |
| Objection handling | Dissolve through empathy and reframing not overcome through pressure | Empowered decisions stick; pressured decisions refund |
| Urgency creation | Use Exclusive Empowerment not countdown timers | Scarcity from readiness not artificial limits |
| Application funnels | Apply AFA 15-point format with coaching-based qualification | Forms should coach while qualifying not just gatekeep |
| Webinar design | Apply ACE Model (Authority-Connection-Enrollment) | Teaching establishes authority; shared experience connects; enrollment is natural next step |
| Non-buyers | Deploy DMV Downsell within 24hrs; transform to smart-buyer identity | Post-campaign is optimal coaching window; non-buyers are most receptive |
| Scaling decision | Seize Before Scale -- audit EP and fix cracks first | Uncaptured revenue often exceeds captured; fix leaks before adding water |
